name: Minimal Valid
description: A minimal but valid skill package used by fixture-driven tests.

# Minimal Valid

This is a fixture skill. It exists only so tests can point a registry at a known
valid package.

## When to use

Never in real work; it is a test fixture.

## Process

1. Loaded by a test registry.
2. Asserted to appear in the index.

## Output

Nothing; this is a fixture.
